category_sources: source_facts.description says it automatically downloads macOS firmwares/installers; official GitHub README describes macOS Installer Super Tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is MIST - macOS Installer Super Tool; source_facts.name provides package id mist-cli.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains usage, subcommands, feature list, and examples; no separate official docs site found in supplied facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ninxsoft/mist-cli; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README both describe a Mac command-line tool for macOS firmware and installer downloads.
